positive: Minimalist, geometric illustration of a celestial body, like a crescent moon or stylized nebula, interwoven with botanical elements such as stylized fern leaves and laurel branches. The composition should be highly symmetrical and centralized, designed as a circular medallion or repeating pattern. Use a palette of deep midnight blue, soft celestial gold, and vibrant emerald green. The style should be highly detailed vector art mixed with etching techniques, favoring strong black outlines and negative space. The design must look clean and crisp for high-quality screen printing on fabric, with smooth gradients and solid color blocks. Aspect Ratio: 1:1.
negative: photorealistic, grainy, blurry, text, logo, watermark, signature, cartoon, low detail, noise, fuzzy, messy, poor symmetry, extra limbs, bad anatomy
